title: MOAR Achievements Mod
body:
### **What is this mod?**

This mod adds more advancements/achievements to the game. It has some that require some grinding, while others can be easy as building a simple farm. These achievements/advancements can take from just a few minutes to a few hours. To complete all achievements/advancements takes dedication from the player. Minecraft has a lot to do, but not a lot of challenges. This mod is to give a challenge, a challenge for the player. This will provide more for the player to do.

### **Features:**

- 45 Grinding Achievements/Advancements
- 10 Non-grinding Achievements/Advancements
- 55 Achievements/Advancements (in total)
